projects.title: VFX Showreel 2025
projects.overview: A curated collection of visual effects work showcasing skills across Compositing, Rotoscoping, Matchmoving, Cleanup, Paint, and Prep. This showreel demonstrates attention to detail, technical accuracy, seamless integration, and cinematic visual quality through a variety of production-style shots.

projects.title: Multi-Pass Compositing Practice
projects.overview: This project is a personal compositing practice created in Foundry Nuke using publicly shared multi-pass render elements provided by VFX Vibe for learning purposes. The complete compositing workflow—including look development, integration, color grading, lighting adjustments, and final shot assembly—was created independently by me.
